name: create_event
description: Create a new event on Google Calendar. Supports attendees, timezones, and descriptions.

start.description: Start date-time in RFC3339 format with timezone offset (e.g. '2026-04-25T10:00:00+04:00')

end.description: End date-time in RFC3339 format with timezone offset (e.g. '2026-04-25T11:00:00+04:00')

timeZone.description: Timezone for the event (e.g. 'Asia/Dubai'). Defaults to 'UTC'.
